Class ActionCard

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
nongui.baseentity.ActionCard
Direct Known Subclasses:
HeroCard, ItemCard, MagicCard
public abstract class ActionCard extends BaseCard
An abstract base class for cards that can be actively played by a player to perform an action. Any card that has an immediate playable effect (e.g., MagicCard, ItemCard, ModifierCard) should extend this class.

  • Constructor Details

    • ActionCard

      protected ActionCard(String name, String flavorText, String abilityDescription, String type)
      Constructs a new ActionCard with the specified details. This constructor is protected because ActionCard is an abstract class.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the action card.
      flavorText - The lore or story text associated with the card.
      abilityDescription - The description of the card's mechanical effect.
      type - The category/type of the card.

  • Method Details

    • playCard

      public abstract boolean playCard(Player player)
      Executes the specific logic or effect of this card when played. Subclasses must implement this method to define what happens when the card is used.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who is attempting to play the card.
      Returns:
      true if the card was played successfully (e.g., conditions met, effect resolved), false if the action was canceled, failed, or blocked (e.g., insufficient AP, canceled via Challenge).
